@startuml
participant "client" as Client

participant "Handler" as Handler

Handler <<interface>>

Handler contains

Handler has

    "handle()" as handle

Handler has

Client -- Handler : handle()

Handler -- Handler : self

Handler -- ConcreteHandler1 : inherits

@enduml
